message:
chore(gitignore): cover relocated agent-config files + artifacts/root-scratch/

Two pattern additions matching this session's repo reorganization
(commit eee9f7e8 — moved {codex,cursor,gemini}.mcp.json to sanitized
.example.json templates under configs/mcp/, and archived root scratch
under artifacts/). The corresponding sources at the repo root no
longer exist; these patterns just keep them from re-appearing if an
agent regenerates them in-place from a config tool.

Patterns added:

- codex.mcp.json
- cursor.mcp.json
- gemini.mcp.json
  Slot directly underneath the existing *.mcp.json.*.bak pattern in
  the "Core dumps and agent config backups" section. Mirrors the
  already-ignored cline.mcp.json / opencode.json / windsurf.mcp.json
  entries; the codex/cursor/gemini variants were the only gap.

- /artifacts/root-scratch/
  Anchored at repo root, so it doesn't shadow other artifacts/
  subdirectories that *are* tracked (artifacts/perf/,
  artifacts/root-archive/...). Matches the intent set by the
  scripts/archive/root-scratch/ pattern in the parallel frankenfs
  reorganization.

No tracked files affected; these are new patterns for a clean
working tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -134,6 +134,9 @@ rch-install/
 core.*
 core
 *.mcp.json.*.bak
+codex.mcp.json
+cursor.mcp.json
+gemini.mcp.json
 cline.mcp.json
 opencode.json
 windsurf.mcp.json
@@ -172,3 +175,6 @@ git_recent.txt
 git_log.txt
 git_log_*.txt
 git_show_*.txt
+
+# Archived root scratch
+/artifacts/root-scratch/
